# HPD.ML.Transforms.TypeConvertTransform

- Package: `HPD-ML-Transforms` `0.5.0`
- Assembly: `HPD.ML.Transforms`
- Namespace: `HPD.ML.Transforms`
- Kind: `class`

Converts a column from one CLR type to another using Convert.ChangeType.
